stemHtml: A pilot intends to fly a route from A to B, covering a distance of 80 NM and departing at 12:15. The flight is planned with a heading of 235°. After 40 NM and at 12:27 the aircraft is crossing a rail line, which runs 90° to the flight track. At 12:37 the pilot should be 1 nm left of the track but s/he is actually 3 NM to the right. What Heading should s/he fly to reach her/his intended destination and what will be the ETA?
